titleStmt.title: SII 31.94: original edition by C. A. Padmanabha Sastri and T. S. Ravishankar
No. 94. (A.R. No. B 267 of 1936.) DĒVARĀYAPURAM, SIRUVEL TALUK, KURNOOL DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab set up against the front wall of the Āñjanēya shrine.
This inscription is dated Śaka 1469, Plavaṅga, Śrāvaṇa, ba. 30, Monday corresponding to 15 August 1547 A.D.

Registers the gift of the village Dēvarāyapura as an agrahāra to the Vidvanmahājanas of that village by China-Avubhaḷayyadēva mahārāju, son of Narasiṅgarāja and the grandson of Nandēla Sinagrāja of lunar race and the Ātrēya gōtra, for the merit of Narasiṅgarāja Raghupatirāja Avubhalarāju. The granted village is stated to have been situated in Śiruvāḷa-sīma which was given to the donor as nāyaṁkara by the king. The grant was made in the presence of the god Paṇḍarangi Viṭṭalēśvara.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . namastuṁga śiraścuṁbi caṁdracāmara cāravē ttrelōkya sa
garāraṁbha mūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē . svastiśrī jayābhyudaya śālivā
hana śakavarṣaṁbulu 1469 Āgunēṭi plavaṁga saṁvatsara śrāvaṇa ba 30
sō . śrīmadrājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara śrīvīrapratāpa śrīsadāśivadēvama
hārāyalu vijayanagaramaṁdu vajrasiṁhāsanārūḍhulai pṛdhivi
sāmrājyamu cēyucuṁḍḍaṁgānu . śrīmadyanādi ṣaṭkarma nira
tulaina rāmānugraha samardulaina dēvarāyapurāgrahāra sthitāśēṣa
vidvanmahāṅanālakunnu . Ātrēyagōtrōdbhuvulaina sōmavaṁśādhīśva
rulaina dāna kṣātra parāyaṇulaina naṁdela siṁgarājuṁgāri pautru
lunnu narasiṁgarājuṁgāri putruluṁnaina śrīmanmahāmaṁḍḍalēśvara naṁde
la cinnaAvubhaḷayya dēvamahārājulu caṁdamu samarpiṁci yi
ccina dharmma śāsanakrama meṭlannanu māku sadāśivadēva mahārāya
lu nāyaṁkarānaku pāliṁcina śiruvōḷlasīmalōni mī dēvarā
yapurāgrahārānanukonē śrōtriyaṁmodalugānu sarvamunnu
yī tadhātidhi puṇyakālamaṁddu narasiṁgarāju raghapatirāju
Avubaḷarājuṁgāriki puṇyamugānu caturdaśa bhuvanādhiśvaru
laina paṁḍḍaraṁgani viṭhalēśvarula sannithini sarvamānyamugānu dhāravō
si yistimi ganaka mīputra pautra pāraṁparyamugānu Ācaṁdrā
rkasdhāyigānu Anubhaviṁcci sukhāna bradikēdi yīdharmaśā
sanānaku yavvarudappinānu tamatallitaṁḍrulanunnuguruvula
nunnu gōbrāhmaṇulanunnu vāru(ra)ṇāsilōnuvadhiṁcina pā
pānaṁ bōvu vārani yiccina dharmma śāsanamu . svadattāṁ
paradattāṁ vā yōharēta vasuṁdharāṁ . ṣaṣṭhivarṣa saha
srāṇi viṣṭhāyāṁ jāyatē krimiḥ . Ēkaiva bhaganīlōkēsarvē
ṣāmēva bhūbhujāṁ . nabhōgyānakaragrāṁhya vipradattā
vasuṁdharā . śrījagannādhāya namaḥ . śrī śrī śrī .
Digital edition of SII 31.94 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
